caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on political developments in Bihar and Uttar Pradesh. The frames show a split-screen format with various political figures and text overlays providing context. On the left side, there is an image of Nitish Kumar, the Chief Minister of Bihar, with text indicating his role. The central part of the screen displays a map of Uttar Pradesh alongside information about the 2019 Lok Sabha elections, highlighting that the Congress party won only one seat out of 80. On the right side, there are images of other political figures, including Tejashwi Yadav and Shrawan Kumar, with accompanying text. The bottom banner mentions Samrat Choudhary becoming the Deputy Chief Minister of Bihar. The overall narrative seems to discuss potential political alliances and shifts, particularly questioning if JDU will play a significant role in 2024. The timestamp indicates that this segment aired at 10:08 PM.
